mapper.sql: u.user_id AS userId, u.account_id AS accountId, u.dept_id AS deptId, d.tenant_id AS tenantId, u.user_name AS userName, u.nick_name AS nickName, d.dept_type AS deptType, d.dept_category AS deptCategory, d.dept_name AS deptName, r.role_id AS roleId, r.role_key AS roleKey, r.role_name AS roleName, COALESCE(ur.effective_data_scope, r.fixed_data_scope, r.default_data_scope) AS effectiveDataScope
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN sys_dept d ON d.dept_id = u.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.status = '0' WHERE u.account_id = #{accountId} AND u.status = '0' ORDER BY u.user_id ASC

SELECT
FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN sys_dept d ON d.dept_id = u.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.status = '0' WHERE u.account_id = #{accountId} AND u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.status = '0' LIMIT 1
